channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Letters to the Editor debate the economic and practical challenges of extending light rail to Woden
item.description: A series of letters to the editor in The Canberra Times scrutinises the economic and practical viability of extending Canberra's light rail to Woden. Contributors argue that Stage 1 has underperformed...

item.title: Cebu archbishop urges lawmakers to use moral conscience in deciding on VP Sara Duterte impeachment
item.description: Nanawagan si Cebu Archbishop Alberto Uy sa mga mambabatas na gumamit ng isang “prayerfully formed conscience” sa pagdedesisyon kaugnay ng impeachment case laban kay Vice President Sara Duterte. Ayon s...

item.title: FUTA Student Passes Away After Reported Poisoning Incident in Akure
item.description: Na sad tori dey unfold for Federal University of Technology Akure (FUTA) as one 100-level student, Favour Olaniyi wey dey study Surveying and Geoinformatics, don die. The pikin was found dead near him...

item.title: Rahul Gandhi shares light-hearted exchange with BJP-supporting mutual fund distributor
item.description: In a rare and amusing incident, Congress leader Rahul Gandhi engaged in a cordial exchange with Muthukrishnan Dhandapani, a mutual fund distributor who identifies as a long-time supporter of BJP. Dhan...

item.title: How AI Use Among Students Prompted an Insightful Lesson on Writing
item.description: Micah Nathan, a fiction writing lecturer at MIT, observed that some students were submitting AI-generated work. Recognising the polished but impersonal quality of the prose, he confronted the students...

item.title: Iran proposes partial uranium transfer amid ongoing Middle East conflict, rejects dismantling nuclear facilities
item.description: Iran has reportedly responded to the latest U.S. proposal aimed at ending ten weeks of conflict by offering to transfer a portion of its highly enriched uranium to a third country, while rejecting any...

item.title: Seven people involved in two-car crash near Victorville leave three dead and four injured
item.description: On Saturday night near Victorville in San Bernardino County, a tragic collision between two vehicles resulted in three fatalities and four injuries. The crash occurred just before 8 p.m. in the Pinon ...

item.title: Delhi to Make Pink Saheli Card Mandatory for Free Bus Travel from July
item.description: The Delhi government has decided to make the Pink Saheli Card mandatory for women to avail free bus rides in the city starting from July. The scheme, aimed at promoting women’s safety and convenient t...

item.title: Adapting to motherhood in later life: navigating relationships with adult daughters
item.description: In this personal essay, Connie Gibbs reflects on the unexpected challenges of maintaining strong relationships with her adult daughters as they move into middle age. She admits that she once believed ...

item.title: UBA Silent as Security Agencies Deny Detaining Bloggers Over Defamation Claims Against Chairman
item.description: Palava don dey around one case wey concern some bloggers wey people dey accuse say dem don defame UBA Chairman, Tony Elumelu. Nigeria Police and DSS don yan say dem no get these bloggers for their cus...

item.title: Passengers from hantavirus-affected cruise ship repatriated and quarantined
item.description: Passengers from the MV Hondius, a cruise ship affected by a hantavirus outbreak, have started returning to their home countries and are entering quarantine to prevent further spread of the virus. The ...

item.title: Arsenal Four Points Away from Premier League Title After West Ham Win
item.description: Arsenal kept their Premier League title hopes firmly in their own hands after edging West Ham United 1-0, responding well to Manchester City’s earlier 3-0 win over Brentford. The results leave Arsenal...

item.title: Shame and stigma stopping South African girls from seeking sexual health care
item.description: In South Africa, many teenage girls and young women face shame and embarrassment when dealing with sexually transmitted infections (STIs) and vaginal infections, leading to serious health consequences...

item.title: JAMB maintains importance as Sierra Leone studies Nigeria’s admission system
item.description: The Joint Admissions and Matriculation Board (JAMB) don speak up to defend how e still dey important, as some people dey talk say dem wan scrap am. This come as some education officials from Sierra Le...

item.title: FIFA significantly increases top-tier World Cup final ticket prices
item.description: Recent reports indicate that FIFA has substantially increased the price of the best-available tickets for the World Cup final, reaching a staggering figure exceeding sixteen million dollars. The news ...

item.title: Amazon Employees Now Allowed to Use Third-Party AI Coding Tools Alongside Kiro
item.description: Amazon initially pushed its programmers to exclusively use its in-house AI code generation tool, Kiro, discouraging the adoption of third-party alternatives like OpenAI's Codex and Anthropic's Claude....

item.title: Analysis of Newborn Health Trends in San Luis Obispo County Near Diablo Canyon Nuclear Plant
item.description: This report from the Radiation and Public Health Project, authored by Joseph J. Mangano, examines trends in infant and newborn health in San Luis Obispo County, California, particularly in relation to...

item.title: Kaizer Chiefs secure CAF Confederation Cup spot after win over Sekhukhune United
item.description: Kaizer Chiefs have officially secured qualification for next season’s CAF Confederation Cup after defeating Sekhukhune United 2-0 at the Peter Mokaba Stadium. The result takes Amakhosi to 51 points in...

item.title: Multiple Interconnected Risks Threaten Global Financial Stability
item.description: The global financial system is facing a complex set of interconnected risks that go beyond traditional systemic concerns. While markets often navigate minor setbacks, the combination of fiscal, geopol...

item.title: How Coiled Landline Phone Wires Prevented Tangles and Accidents
item.description: Before the age of smartphones and cordless phones, landline phones were almost always connected to the wall with a physical cord. Many of these cords were coiled, a design that wasn’t just decorative ...
